task_prompt: Help me research used 2010 Honda CR-Vs in the $3,000 to $5,000 price range on Facebook Marketplace. In Google Chrome, press cmd+t to open a new tab, then in the URL bar type `https://sheets.new` and press enter — this opens a fresh Google Sheet. Once the sheet loads, click cell A1 and type these headers across row 1, pressing Tab between each one: URL, Asking Price, Year, Mileage, Location, Condition Notes, Messaged. Then press cmd+t again and in the URL bar type the full URL `https://www.facebook.com/marketplace/search?query=2010%20honda%20crv&minPrice=3000&maxPrice=5000` and press enter. For at least 10 listings from the results, open the listing (cmd+click or middle-click to open in a new tab is fine), read the asking price (a plain number, e.g. `4200`, not `$4,200`), year, mileage, and location. Switch back to the Google Sheets tab (cmd+1 through cmd+9 jump to specific tabs by position, or cmd+shift+a opens the tab search) and add one row per listing under the headers — fill URL, Asking Price, Year, Mileage, and Location. Leave Condition Notes and Messaged blank. When you've added all 10 rows, in the Google Sheets tab press cmd+a to select all the data, then cmd+c to copy it to the clipboard so I can verify the contents. Then emit DONE.
